title: andrographis neesiana
intro: Andrographis neesiana, also known as Andrographis paniculata var. neesiana, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Andrographis neesiana include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to help lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Andrographis neesiana is typically prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
